overall.description: First-person exploration of a flooded dystopian urban waterfront at sunset, featuring debris-filled water, burning barrels, and a modern stadium structure with an open-air bar. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity graphics and cinematic golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban plaza with floating debris

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep water filled with floating trash and debris toward a large stadium structure

entered.detail: large modern stadium structure with circular logo on the facade
water surface covered with floating trash, cardboard, and wooden planks
tall glass skyscrapers silhouetted against the sunset
metal barrel with fire burning inside, floating in the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through a flooded urban plaza at golden hour. The water is littered with debris and floating trash. A massive modern stadium building dominates the right side of the frame while the sun sets behind the distant skyline, creating strong backlighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching waterfront stadium and bar pavilion

events.description: passes close to a burning barrel floating in the water

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past burning barrels and approaching an open-air pavilion structure

entered.detail: wooden and metal pavilion structure with open roof beams
scattered palm trees growing along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the stadium structure, passing a burning barrel in the water. An open-air bar pavilion becomes visible on the right, with palm trees lining the approach. The stadium facade fills more of the right side of the frame as the distance closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air waterfront bar with burning fire pits

events.description: enters the covered pavilion area of the waterfront bar
neon signs become visible on the building to the right

agents.ego_description: moving through the bar area, observing the fire pits and neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: figure in red clothing standing near the bar counter

entered.detail: tall building with bright pink neon signage
wooden bar counter with stools and bottles
large fire burning in a metal container on the bar deck

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the semi-covered pavilion area of the waterfront bar, passing under the roof structure. A burning fire pit illuminates the bar counter area, and a pink neon sign becomes visible on a distant building. The stadium building is now visible to the left as the camera moves past it, and an NPC in red stands near the bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with stadium in background

events.description: turns left to follow the waterfront path alongside the bar

agents.ego_description: turning along the waterfront path with the stadium now behind to the left

entered.detail: large dome-shaped structure visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to follow the waterfront promenade, moving away from the bar pavilion. The stadium building recedes into the left background while a distant dome-shaped structure becomes visible on the right. The path continues along the water's edge with the bar structure now behind the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a flooded urban plaza that transitions from an open, debris-strewn waterfront into the sheltered atmosphere of a neon-lit bar. It begins by wading through trash-filled water under a golden sunset, with a massive modern stadium dominating the right side of the frame. As the camera moves closer to the stadium, it passes a burning barrel in the water and approaches an open-air bar pavilion lined with palm trees. The scene then shifts as the camera enters the semi-covered pavilion, passing under the roof toward a glowing fire pit and a pink neon sign while an NPC in red stands nearby. Finally, the camera turns left to follow the waterfront promenade, leaving the bar behind as the stadium recedes into the background and a distant dome-shaped structure emerges on the right.
